items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Highlights GPT-5.6 Sol Cybersecurity Prowess and Codex Security Plugin
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 網路安全優勢與 Codex Security 插件
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI posted on X showcasing GPT-5.6 Sol setting a new state of the art in cybersecurity benchmarks on 'The Last Ones' cyber range. They demonstrated real-world defensive outcomes via the Codex Security plugin in Codex, enabling vulnerability scanning and fixing.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 X 上發文展示 GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場設定新的網路安全基準 SOTA，並透過 Codex 中的 Codex Security 插件展示實際防禦成果，能夠發現、驗證並修復真實程式碼漏洞。
items_flat.analysis_en: This builds on the recent GPT-5.6 family launch, reinforcing OpenAI's enterprise push into secure AI coding tools. It highlights practical translation of frontier benchmarks to developer workflows, though real-world impact depends on adoption and ongoing safety hardening.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這延續近期 GPT-5.6 系列發布，強化 OpenAI 在企業安全 AI 編碼工具的布局。它突顯前沿基準如何轉化為開發者工作流程，但實際影響仍取決於採用率與持續的安全強化。
items_flat.quote: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity on “The Last Ones” cyber range. We’re already seeing that capability translate into defensive outcomes: helping teams find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities in real-world code.
items_flat.quote_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol 在「The Last Ones」網路靶場設定新的網路安全基準 SOTA。我們已看到此能力轉化為防禦成果：幫助團隊在真實程式碼中發現、驗證並修復漏洞。

items_flat.title_en: xAI Emphasizes Grok 4.5 Coding Value; Teases Upcoming 2T Model
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 強調 Grok 4.5 程式碼價值；預告即將到來的 2T 模型
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk posted highlighting Grok 4.5's strong value for coding tasks compared to competitors and noted a new 2T-parameter model (improving on the 1.5T Grok 4.5) will finish initial training next week, potentially exceeding models like Kimi while maintaining efficiency.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 發文強調 Grok 4.5 在程式碼任務相較競爭對手的優異性價比，並指出新的 2T 參數模型（優於 1.5T 的 Grok 4.5）將於下週完成初始訓練，可能超越 Kimi 等模型同時維持高效能。
items_flat.analysis_en: This underscores xAI's focus on cost-effective, practical performance over raw benchmark chasing. The upcoming model signals continued rapid iteration, but details on release, capabilities, and availability remain to be seen.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 這突顯 xAI 注重具成本效益的實用效能而非純基準追逐。即將推出的模型顯示持續快速迭代，但發布細節、能力與可用性仍有待觀察。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 is arguably #1 when taking speed and cost into account
items_flat.quote_zh: 考量速度與成本時，Grok 4.5 可說是 #1

xai.title_en: xAI Emphasizes Grok 4.5 Coding Value; Teases Upcoming 2T Model
xai.title_zh: xAI 強調 Grok 4.5 程式碼價值；預告即將到來的 2T 模型
xai.summary_en: Elon Musk posted highlighting Grok 4.5's strong value for coding tasks compared to competitors and noted a new 2T-parameter model (improving on the 1.5T Grok 4.5) will finish initial training next week, potentially exceeding models like Kimi while maintaining efficiency.
xai.summary_zh: Elon Musk 發文強調 Grok 4.5 在程式碼任務相較競爭對手的優異性價比，並指出新的 2T 參數模型（優於 1.5T 的 Grok 4.5）將於下週完成初始訓練，可能超越 Kimi 等模型同時維持高效能。
xai.analysis_en: This underscores xAI's focus on cost-effective, practical performance over raw benchmark chasing. The upcoming model signals continued rapid iteration, but details on release, capabilities, and availability remain to be seen.
xai.analysis_zh: 這突顯 xAI 注重具成本效益的實用效能而非純基準追逐。即將推出的模型顯示持續快速迭代，但發布細節、能力與可用性仍有待觀察。

xai.quote_zh: 考量速度與成本時，Grok 4.5 可說是 #1

brief_en: On 2026-07-18, OpenAI continued promoting GPT-5.6 Sol's cybersecurity leadership with Codex Security demos. xAI's Elon Musk highlighted Grok 4.5's superior value in coding and teased a stronger 2T-parameter model finishing training next week. No major new model launches across tracked labs in the window.
brief_zh: 2026-07-18，OpenAI 持續推廣 GPT-5.6 Sol 在網路安全基準的領先表現，並展示 Codex Security 插件應用。xAI 的 Elon Musk 強調 Grok 4.5 在程式碼任務的性價比，並預告下週完成訓練的更強 2T 參數模型。本窗口無重大新模型發布。
